user.title: BOM Weather
user.description: Create a weather entity from a Bureau of Meteorology real-time observation JSON feed.

error.invalid_product: Use a BOM product ID like IDN60801.
error.invalid_station: Use the five digit BOM station or WMO ID.
error.forecast_area_required: Enter a BOM forecast area when using a forecast product.
error.forecast_product_required: Enter a BOM forecast product ID when using a forecast area.

abort.already_configured: This BOM product and station are already configured.

init.title: BOM Weather region
init.description: Choose the BOM region to load current station and forecast options.

location.title: BOM Weather options
location.description: Choose the observation station and optional daily forecast area.

manual.title: BOM Weather options
manual.description: BOM discovery is unavailable. Enter the observation station and optional forecast details manually.

error.invalid_station: Use the five digit BOM station or WMO ID.
